title: Wie sagen wir es unseren Kindern?
writer: Wilhelm Ehlers, Luiselotte Enderle, Toni Huppertz
actors: Leny Marenbach, Mathias Wieman, Hilde Körber
plot: Single parents Käthe (mother of three) und Thomas (father of four) fall in love but their wedding plans are vehemently opposed and sabotaged by their kids who hate each other due to a neighborly feud.
